examples.title: Capture failed conditions in guard helpers
examples.description: Pair CallerArgumentExpression with nameof to produce precise diagnostics without hard-coded parameter strings.

examples.title: Build null-check helpers with rich error messages
examples.description: Capture the original call-site expression so thrown exceptions tell you exactly what argument failed validation.
